matched.detector: will you now or in the future require our company to file a petition or application for employment - based immigration status on your behalf to begin or continue employment with our company? if you currently have nonimmigrant status, for example f-1 or h-1, your answer to this question should be "yes."

If you currently have nonimmigrant status, for example F-1 or H-1, your answer to this question should be "yes."

ai.notes: The form uses Lever's standard application structure. The demographic survey fields are optional and part of a separate section.

fields.question: Will you require a reasonable accommodation to complete the hiring process which may include technical testing, virtual and in-person style interviews?
Where did you first hear about Tinder or this job?
Are you authorized to work in the United States?

Will you now or in the future require our company to file a petition or application for employment - based immigration status on your behalf to begin or continue employment with our company? If you currently have nonimmigrant status, for example F-1 or H-1, your answer to this question should be "yes."
This position is based in our West Hollywood office. Do you currently live in the LA area?
options: No, but I'm willing to relocate
No, I would need to work from a different city

fields.question: Are you willing to come into the office during the week (3 days) according to our hybrid policy?
I identify my ethnicity as
options: East Asian (Chinese, Japanese, Korean, Mongolian, Tibetan, Taiwanese, etc.)
South Asian (Bangladeshi, Bhutanese, Indian, Nepali, Pakistani, Sri Lankan)
Southeast Asian (Burmese, Cambodian, Filipino, Hmong, Indonesia, Laotian, Malaysian, Mien, Singaporean, Thai, Vietnamese)
Bi-Racial/Mixed Race - Having 2 or more racial/ethnic groups

fields.question: What gender do you most closely identify as?
Do you identify as part of the LGBTQIA+ community?
